name: API Specification Landscape
description: Structure of the API specification ecosystem, showing format categories and their relationships

categories.name: HTTP API Specifications
categories.description: Formats for describing synchronous HTTP/REST APIs

formats.name: OpenAPI
formats.primary_use: REST API description, documentation, code generation

formats.name: RAML
formats.primary_use: REST API design (largely superseded by OpenAPI)

categories.name: Async and Event-Driven Specifications
categories.description: Formats for describing asynchronous, event-driven, and message-based APIs

formats.name: AsyncAPI
formats.primary_use: Kafka, AMQP, MQTT, WebSocket, SNS/SQS event streams

categories.name: Workflow and Multi-Step Specifications
categories.description: Formats for describing multi-operation API sequences

categories.name: RPC and Binary Specifications
categories.description: Formats for describing RPC and binary protocol APIs

formats.name: GraphQL SDL
formats.primary_use: GraphQL type system and query definitions
